summary: Validated admin JWT auth + AI social draft workflow end-to-end. 18/18 backend pytest cases pass (auth login/logout/me, brute-force lockout, leads auth-gating, social config/generate/list/patch/publish/schedule/reject, static image serving). Frontend login → leads → social editor flow works: redirect gating, cookie-based axios, draft rendering (image + caption + hashtag chips + 4 MOCK platform pills), edit/save, schedule, logout. Only 2 benign 401 console events from initial /api/auth/me probe when session absent. All mocked:true publisher responses verified as intentional (no platform tokens yet).

ui_bugs.component: AdminSocial · status badge on draft card
ui_bugs.issue: After Schedule (or Reject) action the card still shows the previous status badge (e.g. 'REJECTED') until the page is reloaded. The action itself succeeds on the backend and the 'Recent drafts' table text reflects the new status, but the hero card does not re-fetch/refresh state. Minor polish issue.
ui_bugs.selector: .badge / status pill inside Today's Post card

issues: Toast likely auto-dismissed before capture. Confirmed NO '[object Object]' rendering (acceptance criterion satisfied). Consider lengthening toast duration from default to ~4s so a screen-reader / user has time to read.

action_items: (LOW) AdminSocial.jsx — after a successful schedule/publish/reject, refetch the 'today' draft (or optimistically update the status badge) so the card UI reflects the new status without manual reload.
(Optional) AdminLogin.jsx — extend sonner toast duration to ~4000ms on auth error so the message is actually readable.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: bcrypt hash generated with bcrypt.gensalt() (default cost 12) → hashes will start with '$2b$' as required. seed_admin() is idempotent AND re-hashes if env password changed → matches playbook. GOOD.
auth.py: set_auth_cookies uses httponly=True, secure=True, samesite='none', path='/' — correct for cross-site httpOnly cookie under HTTPS preview URL. GOOD.
auth.py: get_current_admin() falls back to Authorization: Bearer — good for curl/pytest without cookies.
server.py line 256: GET /api/leads now correctly depends on get_current_admin. POST /api/leads still PUBLIC (consultation form) — verified.

server.py social_router: date_key uses UTC (strftime on datetime.now(utc)). Daily scheduler is in Asia/Kolkata. Minor edge: a draft generated via UI after 18:30 UTC will share the IST 'next day' date_key while the cron runs in IST timezone — so IST-calendar drafts can skip a day near UTC/IST boundary. Not blocking for MVP.
server.py: CORSMiddleware added AFTER include_router — FastAPI applies middleware regardless of order, so this is fine. allow_credentials=True with explicit FRONTEND_URL origin. GOOD.

server.py: publish_draft handler — scheduled branch requires BOTH publish_now=False AND scheduled_for set, otherwise falls through to immediate publish. A stray publish_now:false with no scheduled_for will silently publish now. Suggest raising 400 'scheduled_for required when publish_now is false'.
social_publish stub: returns ok:true, mocked:true — frontend treats any ok response as success. When real tokens arrive, any_ok() logic will still honour per-platform failures. GOOD.

AdminSocial.jsx: platform pills labelled with '· MOCK' pill directly from configured map — self-documenting for user. Hashtag chips rendered read-only in view mode / as CSV textbox in edit mode — clean.
AuthContext sets axios.defaults.withCredentials=true globally → cookies travel with every API call. Verified in browser.
No rate limiting on POST /api/leads still (flagged in iter2).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_and_social.py (new — 18 tests covering auth, leads auth-gating, social CRUD + publish/schedule/reject)

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all acceptance criteria met; 1 LOW-priority card-refresh polish item

seed_data_creation: Created 1 social draft via /api/social/drafts/generate (used for all backend + UI tests). Created 1 TEST_-prefixed lead (TEST_auth_iter3). Used exactly 1 AI generation call (well under the 3-4 budget).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Next agent: 2 pytest suites exist — /app/backend/tests/test_leads_api.py (10 tests) and /app/backend/tests/test_auth_and_social.py (18 tests). Run: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://lumiere-interior.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v`. Note: brute_force_lockout test uses a disposable email (brute_<rand>@example.com) so it will NOT lock out the real admin. Admin cookie fixture is session-scoped — reusing it across tests is safe. AI generation is costly (~20-40s + credits); reuse shared_draft_id fixture. When testing UI publish/schedule: first reset draft status back to 'draft' via mongo direct update because backend tests leave it as 'rejected'. Browser automation snippet provided in iter3 log.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no blocking issues. Only one LOW-priority UI-refresh polish item on AdminSocial card badge after action.
